label: Won't Turn Over
description: Missing battery, ignition coil, or engine. Car is a paperweight.

label: No Spark
description: Ignition coil or spark plugs missing. Fuel, no fire.

label: No Compression
description: Head gasket missing. Combustion chamber can't hold pressure.
sub_causes: Combustion chamber open to coolant jacket

label: Fuel Starved
description: Fuel pump can't keep up with demand. Engine runs lean and dies.
sub_causes: Fuel pump flow rate below 60% of HP demand
consequences: Engine dies at idle or under load

label: Grenaded
description: HP so far past drivetrain rating the transmission explodes on first rev.

label: Overheated
description: Heat output exceeds cooling capacity by 30%. Engine cooks itself.

label: Hydrolocked
description: Water in the intake destroyed pistons and rods.
consequences: Connecting rods bent on hydraulic lock

label: NOS Stress
description: Nitrous is pushing the drivetrain past its comfort zone. Drivetrain life is counting down.

label: Blown
description: Drivetrain output exceeds rating. Running near grenade limit.

label: Running Hot
description: Heat output moderately exceeds cooling. Reliability suffers.

label: Turbo Lag
description: High spool time. Power delivery is inconsistent off the line.

label: Bogs Down
description: Peak power RPM is above the transmission shift point. Power gets cut short.
sub_causes: Peak HP RPM exceeds shift point by 1500+
consequences: Power band cut short in each gear

label: Rubs
description: Tires too wide for the fender. Rubbing at full lock.
consequences: Tire wear accelerated at full lock

label: Scrapes
description: Splitter and low ride height combination scrapes on anything but a billiards table.
sub_causes: Ride height below 4 inches with splitter fitted

label: Topped Out
description: Diff ratio too tall — car hits its gearing ceiling before aerodynamic top speed.
sub_causes: Differential ratio above 4.5 with sub-150mph top speed
consequences: Top speed capped by gearing not aerodynamics

label: Sleeper
description: Monster power hiding under a stock exterior. Nobody sees it coming.

label: All Motor
description: No forced induction. Pure naturally aspirated muscle.

label: Balanced Build
description: HP, grip, and aero in harmony. A well-rounded machine.

label: Track Prepped
description: Aero, race suspension, light weight. This car was born for a circuit.

label: OEM Spec
description: Engine, trans, and diff from the same OEM family. Perfect compatibility.

label: Widowmaker
description: Massive power, sketchy grip, rear-wheel drive. Pray for straight roads.

label: Garage Queen
description: Expensive and heavy. More show than go.

label: Grocery Getter
description: All stock parts. Dependable but uninspiring.

label: Rat Rod
description: Rough looks, serious power. Character over polish.

label: Riceburner
description: Huge wing on a tiny engine. Drag without the downforce.
